headline: How The Shifting Story For GoodRx (GDRX) Is Reshaping Analyst Views And Valuation
summary: GoodRx Holdings is back in focus after a fair value estimate was raised to US$3.18 from US$2.82, putting fresh attention on where the stock might fit in your watchlist. Some analysts have moved price targets toward US$4 while others have pulled them down into the US$2 to US$3 range, reflecting very different reads on recent guidance and the business mix. Keep reading to see what is driving that split view and how you can follow the evolving narrative around GoodRx. Analyst Price Targets don't...

headline: Citi sets bold Pershing Square stock price target for 2026

headline: How The Ciena (CIEN) Narrative Is Evolving With AI Data Center Demand And Valuation Debate
summary: The updated analyst fair value estimate for Ciena has shifted from US$378.11 to US$452.12, signaling a reset in what some models suggest the stock could be worth. This change sits alongside research that highlights stronger expectations around optical networking demand tied to data center and AI infrastructure spending, while also reflecting debate over how much of that story is already in the price. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative is taking shape and what to watch...
